1.label: On/Off (S1)
1.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off with the S1 switch (uses Basic command class).

2.label: On/Off (S2)
2.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off with the S2 switch (uses Basic command class).

options.label: All on inactive, all off inactive
All on inactive, all off active
All on active, all off inactive
All on active, all off active

paramInformation.label: Auto Off
paramInformation.description: Automatic turning off the relays after the time set in parameters 4 and 5

options.label: Auto off disabled for both relays
Auto off enabled for relay 1, disabled for relay 2
Auto off disabled for relay 1, enabled for relay 2
Auto off enabled for both relays

paramInformation.label: Auto Off: Manual Override
paramInformation.description: When enabled, a button push turns the relay off before the auto off time expires

options.label: Manual override disabled
Manual override enabled
Auto off disabled
Auto off disabled

paramInformation.label: Sending Commands to Group 1 Devices (S1)
paramInformation.description: Double click functionality requires parameter 15 set to 1

options.label: Commands sent when device is turned on and off
Commands sent when turned off, double click turns on to last state
Commands sent when turned off, double click turns on to 100%

paramInformation.label: Sending Commands to Group 2 Devices (S2)
paramInformation.description: Double click functionality requires parameter 15 set to 1

options.label: Commands sent when device is turned on and off
Commands sent when turned off, double click turns on to last state
Commands sent when turned off, double click turns on to 100%

paramInformation.label: Toggle Switch Behavior
paramInformation.description: Determines how the device state follows a toggle switch

options.label: Device changes status on switch status change
Device status depends on switch status
Momentary switch
Toggle switch

paramInformation.label: Dimmer/Roller Shutter Control
paramInformation.description: Dim lighting or move roller shutters in association group 1 by holding or double-pressing the switch (momentary switches only)

paramInformation.label: Relay 1: Smoke, CO or CO2 Alarm Response
Relay 2: Smoke, CO or CO2 Alarm Response

metadata.inclusion: Quickly press the S1 switch or the B-button three times. For a toggle switch, change its position three times.
metadata.exclusion: Quickly press the S1 switch or the B-button three times. For a toggle switch, change its position three times.
metadata.reset: Press and hold the B-button for 3 seconds after connecting mains voltage to the device.
